hero.tagline: Intercultural Psychologist · MHPSS Consultant · Migration & HIV
hero.headline: Mental Health Without Borders
hero.description: Psychological support and psychosocial consulting in migration, HIV and international work contexts. Over 20 years of experience across Brazil, Africa and Europe.
hero.pillar3: Preventive mental health in the workplace
hero.languages: Sessions in Portuguese, English, Spanish and German

about.label: Background
about.title: My professional journey
about.desc1: I am a psychologist with international practice, specialised in mental health and psychosocial support in complex settings, including humanitarian interventions.
about.desc2: My work focuses on supporting the quality of life and mental health of people in vulnerable situations.
about.quote: "Geographic borders should not be barriers to accessing mental health care."

t1.title: Intercultural Psychologist – Brazilian Embassy Berlin
t1.desc: Clinical and advisory services for the Brazilian community and expatriates in Germany.

t2.title: Psychologist – Malengo Foundation
t2.desc: Psychosocial support for refugees and migrants integrating into Europe.

t3.title: Clinical Practice & Consulting: Migration, HIV and MHPSS
t3.desc: Focus on mental health in migration contexts, empowerment of migrant women, integration into the German job market, HIV stigma, structural racism and psychosocial vulnerability.

t4.title: Humanitarian Projects – MSF & ARK · Africa
t4.desc: Psychosocial coordination with Médecins Sans Frontières and Absolute Return for Kids in Mozambique and Eswatini. HIV/AIDS and Tuberculosis work.

t5.title: Clinical Psychology & Project Management · Brazil
t5.desc: Clinical psychology practice and social project management in Brazil.

counselling.label: Psychology
counselling.title: Intercultural Psychological Counselling
counselling.description: Migration brings profound changes — to identity, belonging and routine. Intercultural counselling provides a safe space to process these challenges in all their complexity.
counselling.preventionDesc: Preventive support reduces risks and strengthens inner resources:
prevention: Supporting integration in the host country

consulting.label: Institutional
consulting.title: MHPSS, Migration and Preventive Mental Health Consulting
consulting.description: I work with NGOs, international organisations, companies and humanitarian projects to develop and implement effective psychosocial mental health strategies.

features.title: MHPSS Programmes
features.desc: Development and implementation of mental health and psychosocial support programmes for humanitarian organisations.

features.title: HIV & Psychosocial Support
features.desc: Integrated strategies for stigma reduction, emotional support and access to care.

features.title: Corporate Mental Health
features.desc: Burnout prevention and wellbeing promotion in multicultural and international workplaces.

features.title: Migration & Integration
features.desc: Specialist consulting on psychosocial support policies for migrant and refugee populations.

testimonials.title: What people say about my work

prices.title: Investing in mental health

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.description: I'm available for individual sessions and institutional consulting. Get in touch to take the first step.
